title: cousinia pterocaulos
intro: Cousinia pterocaulos, also known as the feather-stemmed Cousinia, is a perennial herb in the sunflower family, characterized by its unique feathery stems and small yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cousinia pterocaulos include its ability to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its potential to support digestive health and reduce inflammation. Cousinia pterocaulos can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
